name: Melati Jawa
signature: A kawung batik motif rendered as a recurring divider beneath every section label, with a gunungan (wayang mountain) silhouette as the cover centerpiece.
brief: Traditional Central/East Javanese wedding aesthetic — batik patterning, maroon and gold ceremonial palette, formal and culturally rooted. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara, quick-nav, auto-scroll) alongside the gunungan cover and kawung dividers.
